headline: Accenture Reports Third-Quarter Fiscal 2024 Results
summary: Accenture reported third-quarter fiscal 2024 results with new bookings of $21.1 billion, a 22% increase, and significant generative AI bookings totaling $2 billion year-to-date. Revenues were $16.5 billion, a 1% decrease in U.S. dollars but a 1.4% increase in local currency, with adjusted operating margin at 16.4%. The company updated its fiscal 2024 outlook, expecting full-year revenue growth of 1.5% to 2.5% in local currency and maintaining strong free cash flow projections.
label: negative

headline: Accenture Reports Second-Quarter Fiscal 2024 Results
summary: Accenture reported its second-quarter fiscal 2024 results, highlighting record new bookings of $21.6 billion and over $600 million in generative AI new bookings for the quarter. The company posted revenues of $15.8 billion, flat year over year, and updated its full-year fiscal 2024 business outlook, expecting local currency revenue growth of 1% to 3%. Accenture also declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.29 per share and detailed its financial performance across geographic markets and industry groups.
label: negative

headline: Accenture Reports First-Quarter Fiscal 2025 Results
summary: Accenture reported strong first-quarter fiscal 2025 results with broad-based revenue growth across all markets and industry groups, leading to a raised fiscal 2025 revenue outlook. The company achieved new bookings of $18.7 billion, including $1.2 billion in generative AI, and reported revenues of $17.7 billion, a 9% increase in U.S. dollars. Accenture also increased its quarterly cash dividend by 15% and updated its full-year fiscal 2025 outlook for revenue growth and GAAP EPS.
label: negative

headline: Alex Wilkes
summary: Alex Wilkes serves as the Chief Executive Officer of National Vision, a position he assumed in August 2025 after joining as President in August 2024. He is responsible for leading the company's strategy, growth, and transformation, focusing on enhancing customer experience and delivering shareholder value. With over a decade of leadership in the eye care industry, including roles at CooperVision and EssilorLuxottica, Wilkes brings a strong background in accelerating performance and developing successful brand strategies.
label: positive

headline: Workday Named a Leader in the 2024 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Cloud ERP for Service-Centric Enterprises
summary: Workday has been recognized as a Leader in the 2024 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Cloud ERP for Service-Centric Enterprises for the third consecutive time, and also as a Customers’ Choice. The company highlights its unique value delivery through integrating external systems, hyper-automating core processes, empowering people, and providing deeper insights with AI-driven analytics. Workday emphasizes its global presence, commitment to privacy and security, and continuous innovation to help service-centric organizations achieve greater efficiency and growth.
label: negative

headline: ServiceNow unveils new AI-powered capabilities to help improve employee experiences, supercharge talent development, and optimize in-person work
summary: ServiceNow has announced new AI-powered capabilities at Knowledge 2024 to enhance employee experiences, talent development, and in-person work optimization. These enhancements include AI-infused Talent Development solutions for skills identification, internal mobility, and mentoring, as well as Workplace Service Delivery capabilities to improve collaboration and facility utilization. New research from ServiceNow and Pearson also highlights the significant demand for skilled IT workers driven by AI and emerging technologies.
label: negative

headline: A major finance firm is requiring its 35,000 employees to take a generative AI bootcamp
summary: S&P Global is partnering with Accenture to put all 35,000 of its employees through a "comprehensive gen AI learning program" starting this month. This initiative aims to equip S&P Global's workforce with AI fluency, addressing the financial service industry's increasing reliance on AI and AI talent. The collaboration also extends to AI development and benchmarking across the financial services industry, combining Accenture's Foundation Model Services with S&P AI Benchmarks by Kensho.
label: positive

headline: Press Kit: Intel Vision 2024
summary: The Intel Vision 2024 event focused on advances in artificial intelligence for the enterprise, featuring Intel CEO Pat Gelsinger and industry leaders. Intel introduced a scalable systems strategy for AI, new enterprise AI solutions, and unveiled the Intel® Gaudi® 3 AI accelerator, which promises significant performance improvements. The event included keynotes, discussions, demos, and media assets showcasing Intel's commitment to transforming business with AI.
label: positive
